description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, asymmetrical body finished in a deep green color and a white pickguard. The neck is long and slender, made of a wood-like material, and features a dark fingerboard with no visible fret markers. The headstock is angled and features six tuning pegs arranged in a single row, with a distinctive, slightly offset shape. The bridge and pickup area are rendered in a dark color, with minimal visible hardware detail. The back of the guitar is solid green, with no visible electronics covers or strap buttons. The overall design is modern and stylized, with simplified geometric forms and a matte finish.
description: A modern, green electric guitar with a white pickguard, wooden neck, and a single-row headstock. The design is sleek and stylized with minimal hardware detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green body, white pickguard, dark bridge area, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's thin body and neck, with tuning pegs visible at the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid green back of the guitar and the wooden neck, with no visible hardware or covers.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness of the body and neck, with tuning pegs at the headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a slightly offset contour.
